mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO document_chunk ( document_id, chunk_content, chunk_index, vector_id, tags, status, start_position, end_position, page_number, section_title, paragraph_index, line_range, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.documentId}, #{item.chunkContent}, #{item.chunkIndex}, #{item.vectorId}, #{item.tags}, #{item.status}, #{item.startPosition}, #{item.endPosition}, #{item.pageNumber}, #{item.sectionTitle}, #{item.paragraphIndex}, #{item.lineRange}, #{item.createTime})
